mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_user_preference ( user_id, habit_summary, preferred_answer_style, recent_topics, last_question, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{habitSummary}, #{preferredAnswerStyle}, #{recentTopics}, #{lastQuestion}, #{updateTime} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET habit_summary = EXCLUDED.habit_summary, preferred_answer_style = EXCLUDED.preferred_answer_style, recent_topics = EXCLUDED.recent_topics, last_question = EXCLUDED.last_question, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
